Trees can be taken to other countries and there grafted on
others, if they are smeared from root to the stem with ghee, andro-
pogon, sesamum, honey, Vidahga, milk and cow-dung.
[The word may afso be construed thus :
Trees thus treated can be safely taken to another place and planted
there. Here Utpala quotes a verse without naming, possibly from
Sage Ka^yapa :

530 Brhat SamhitH
r^^MH ll]

One should be clean and pure and worship a tree with ablu-
tions and sandal paste etc. and then graft it. Then it will thrive
even with the leaves with which its has been grafted.
